ehr.primaryDx: Major depressive disorder, severe, recurrent, with psychotic features

segments.speaker: psychiatrist
segments.text: Can you tell me what brought you in today?

segments.speaker: patient
segments.text: I had a plan to end my life. I had the pills counted out.

segments.speaker: psychiatrist
segments.text: Are you having thoughts of hurting yourself right now?

segments.speaker: patient
segments.text: Yes. I still think it would be easier if I didn't wake up.

segments.speaker: psychiatrist
segments.text: Have you been able to sleep or eat since this started?

segments.speaker: patient
segments.text: No. I haven't eaten in two days. I just lay there.

segments.speaker: psychiatrist
segments.text: Who is at home with you?

segments.speaker: patient
segments.text: I live alone. My sister used to check on me but she moved away last month.

segments.speaker: psychiatrist
segments.text: We're going to start you on sertraline and monitor you closely.

segments.speaker: nurse
segments.text: She will need close observation overnight given the plan she described.

segments.speaker: psychiatrist
segments.text: Day five. Let's review where things stand.

segments.speaker: nurse
segments.text: Overnight she was on fifteen-minute checks and still isn't sleeping more than two hours.

segments.speaker: nurse
segments.text: She needed prompting for meals and showers again today.

segments.speaker: patient
segments.text: I still think about not waking up, but I haven't acted on it.

segments.speaker: psychiatrist
segments.text: We increased the sertraline two days ago and just started olanzapine; we need to watch her closely while these settle.

segments.speaker: social_worker
segments.text: She lives alone and her sister, who was checking on her, moved out of state last month.

segments.speaker: psychiatrist
segments.text: So no one would be with her if she left now.

segments.speaker: psychiatrist
segments.text: The medication changes need at least another week of inpatient monitoring before we can consider discharge.

segments.speaker: nurse
segments.text: She attempted to leave the unit this morning but was redirected.

segments.speaker: psychiatrist
segments.text: We will continue the current plan and reassess in 48 hours.
